title: Mega Gardevoir's SMP
description: The cobblemon content-filled modpack for the Mega Gardevoir's SMP server.
body:
# Mega Gardevoir’s Hub SMP Modpack Current version: *Fabric • Minecraft 1.21.1*
**This modpack is intended for Mega Gardevoir's Hub members, to play in its SMP!** You don't need to read this next description, but it shows some details for what to find in the modpack: --- Step into a lovingly curated world where **Cobblemon** and **smooth multiplayer** go hand-in-hand. Whether you’re here to catch ‘em all, build big bases, or just hang out with friends, this pack brings together the perfect mix of fun, performance, and polish. ## What You’ll Find Inside - **Cobblemon at its best** All your favorite Pokémon mechanics—breeding, Mega evolutions, custom UIs—seamlessly blended into Minecraft. - **Stunning environments** Dynamic weather, ambient sounds, falling leaves and particle effects make every biome feel alive. - **Everyday quality-of-life** Inventory shortcuts, clearer tooltips, faster load times, chat improvements and a sleek new menu. - **Rock-solid multiplayer** Optimized for smooth server performance: faster chunk loading, stable connections, Discord chat integration. --- ## Why You’ll Love It - **Jump in and play** – zero fiddling: everything’s set up and tested to “just work.” - **Stay on top of updates** – Get updates with minimal effort. - **Built for community** – designed around group play, with handy tools that keep everyone in sync. ---
Sample Mods Included (click to expand) Cobblemon, Cobblemon MegaShowdown, Sodium, Lithium, EMI, Jade, AmbientEnvironment, DynamicFPS, MouseTweaks, EnchDesc, Discord MC Chat, AntiXray, and more community favorites—all tested together for a hassle-free experience.
